case_title: STONE, STEPHEN VS MEYER, LUCILLE DEDIER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,400.00 FILED BY STONE, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT MEYER, LUCILLE DEDIER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-03-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MEYER, LUCILLE DEDIER
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MEYER, LUCILLE DEDIER AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT STONE, STEPHEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-03-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STONE, STEPHEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEYER, LUCILLE DEDIER $760.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $782.00, PER BUSINESS AND PROFESSIONS CODE SECTION 7057(B), STATES, IN PART ".. A GENERAL BUILDING CONTRACTOR SHALL NOT TAKE A PRIME CONTRACT FOR ANY PROJECT INVOLVING TRADES OTHER THAN FRAMING OR CARPENTRY.. UNLESS THE GENERAL BUILDING CONTRACTOR HOLDS THE APPROPRIATE SPECIALTY LICENSE OR SUBCONTRACTS WITH AN APPROPRIATE LICENSED SPECIALTY CONTRACTOR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MEYER, LUCILLE DEDIER RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT STONE, STEPHEN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,022.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF STONE, STEPHEN
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 27929, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STONE, STEPHEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MEYER, LUCILLE DEDIER JUDGEMENT ON COMPLAINT HAD BEEN PAID & SATISFIED. AND ENTERED IN SCA 27929 ON 12/02/05. THE COMPLAINT IS THEREFORE, DISMISSED PURSUANT TO CCP 664.6. EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MEYER, LUCILLE DEDIER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT STONE, STEPHEN JUDGMENT ON THE CROSS-CLAIM IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF STEPHEN STONE AND AGAINST LUCILLE MEYER. LUCILLE DEDIER MEYER SHALL RECOVER NOTHING ON HER CROSS-CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
